label: Peak Daily Driver
verdict: Solid all-rounder with a good mix of power, space, and features for the price.
whatMakesSpecial: The Commodore Tourer V offers a unique blend of European design with the practicality of a wagon, coupled with a powerful V6 engine.
whyEnthusiastsCare: The Holden Commodore has a strong legacy in New Zealand, known for its reliability and performance, particularly in the V6 and V8 variants.

ownerVibe.label: Dealer / Trade Listing
ownerVibe.reasoning: Listed by Armstrong's Dongfeng & Nissan Lower Hutt, clearly a dealer listing with warranty options and delivery services.

carsCoffee.description: While not a head-turner, the Commodore Tourer V's practicality and performance will still draw interest from fellow enthusiasts.

communityCredibility.description: The Commodore name carries weight in NZ, but the Tourer V is more about practicality than pure enthusiast appeal.

socialStanding: The practical choice for those who want a bit of everything without compromising on style or power.

specSignificance.note: All-wheel drive adds versatility and confidence in various driving conditions.
Top-spec trim with luxury features like leather seats and a BOSE sound system.

priceVerdict.reason: The price is in line with market expectations for a well-equipped, NZ new, low-mileage example.

reasons: This model doesn't command a significant enthusiast premium due to its focus on practicality over performance.

priceOutlook.reason: Values for late-model Commodores are holding steady as they remain popular for their practicality and performance.

issues.title: Timing Chain Stretch
issues.detail: The 3.6L V6 can suffer from timing chain stretch, which is costly to repair if not caught early.

issues.title: Transmission Issues
issues.detail: The 9-speed automatic can develop shift quality issues; a fluid change may cost $300â500 NZD.

steeringFeel.description: The steering is light and easy, making it a breeze for daily driving, though it lacks the feedback of a sports car.

engineCharacter.description: The 3.6L V6 provides a smooth and linear power delivery, with enough grunt to make overtaking effortless.

dailyComfort.description: Comfortable ride with plenty of space and features; perfect for long trips or family duties.

overallFun.description: While not a sports car, the Tourer V's power and AWD make it enjoyable for spirited drives.

drivingCharacter.summary: A well-rounded package that balances power, comfort, and practicality.

reasons: Unlikely to become a classic due to its focus on practicality, but may hold value as a solid all-rounder.

regretRisk.reason: With a good mix of features and performance, it's unlikely to disappoint as a daily driver.

marketTrend.reason: The demand for practical, well-equipped wagons remains steady in NZ.

reasons: Reasonable maintenance costs and stable value make it a sound financial choice.

modPotential.powerCeiling: A tune and exhaust can push power closer to 250kW, costing around $2,000â3,000 NZD.
firstMods: Cold air intake for improved breathing and slight power gain.
Upgraded brake pads for better stopping power.
modPotential.handlingUpgrades: Coilovers from brands like BC Racing can improve handling without sacrificing comfort.
modPotential.partsEcosystem: Decent aftermarket support with parts available from both local and international suppliers.
modPotential.collectorRisk: Modifications are unlikely to impact resale negatively, as this model isn't a collector's item.

questionsToAsk: Has the timing chain been inspected or replaced?
Are there any service records for the transmission fluid change?
Is there any remaining warranty or service plan?
enthusiastTake: A solid choice for those who need a practical daily driver with a bit of power and luxury thrown in.

alternatives.name: Subaru Outback 3.6R
alternatives.whySuited: Similar AWD wagon with a strong reputation for reliability and practicality.
alternatives.howDiffers: The Outback offers a more rugged, off-road capable package with a slightly less premium interior.

alternatives.name: Mazda CX-9
alternatives.whySuited: Offers a spacious interior and similar power output with a turbocharged engine.
alternatives.howDiffers: The CX-9 is more SUV-like with higher ride height and a focus on family comfort.

alternatives.name: Ford Mondeo Wagon
alternatives.whySuited: A practical and spacious wagon with a good balance of features and driving dynamics.
alternatives.howDiffers: The Mondeo offers a more European driving feel with a slightly smaller engine.
